glossary.build identity: The core plan your stats, gear, and upgrades are all supporting.
glossary.bottleneck: The main weakness currently preventing progression, such as mana sustain or survivability.
glossary.threshold: The minimum stat level needed for a build to feel stable in the target content.

build_principles: A focused build usually outperforms a broad build in progression content.
Fixing the weakest slot often gives a larger upgrade than chasing an expensive perfect item.
Match your stat priorities to the exact content you want to clear next.

stat_focus.mana_regen: Low mana stability often causes failed boss attempts before raw damage becomes the real issue.
stat_focus.vitality: Survivability thresholds reduce reset pressure and make damage windows easier to use.
stat_focus.spell_power: Damage scaling is valuable only after the build can survive and sustain long enough to use it.
